comment: Run the test suite before any 'git commit' Bash invocation. Blocks the commit if tests fail. Skip with TEST_BEFORE_COMMIT_SKIP=1 for cases where a quick docs-only commit doesn't warrant the test run. Fails CLOSED if python3 is missing or CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT cannot be parsed — better to block a commit than silently skip tests. Install by merging the 'hooks.PreToolUse' array into ~/.claude/settings.json.

hooks.comment: Detect 'git commit'; run Go tests (race-detector on, count=1 to defeat cache) or Maven test depending on project type. Honor TEST_BEFORE_COMMIT_SKIP=1. Parses CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT with python3 (universally available) rather than jq.
hooks.command: if [ "$TEST_BEFORE_COMMIT_SKIP" = "1" ]; then exit 0; fi; command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'test-before-commit hook: python3 not found; failing closed' >&2; exit 2; }; cmd=$(printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c 'import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print(d.get("command",""))' 2>/dev/null) || { echo 'test-before-commit hook: failed to parse CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; failing closed' >&2; exit 2; }; [ -n "$cmd" ] || { echo 'test-before-commit hook: empty .command; failing closed' >&2; exit 2; }; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bgit\s+commit\b'; then echo 'Tests before commit…' >&2; if [ -f go.mod ]; then go test -race -count=1 ./... >&2 || { echo 'go test failed; commit blocked. Set TEST_BEFORE_COMMIT_SKIP=1 to bypass intentionally.' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; if [ -f pom.xml ]; then mvn -B test >&2 || { echo 'mvn test failed; commit blocked. Set TEST_BEFORE_COMMIT_SKIP=1 to bypass intentionally.' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; fi; exit 0
